introSection: Wild Mouse was a steel hybrid wild mouse roller coaster built by UK operator Butlin's (under license from B. A. Schiff & Associates) that was previously located at Funland Hayling Island in Haying Island, Hampshire, England, UK. It was replaced by a steel roller coaster for the 1989 season, and the ride was sold for spares to David Pickstone for use on his Wild Mouse at Brean Leisure Park.
fullText: Wild Mouse was a steel hybrid wild mouse roller coaster built by UK operator Butlin's (under license from B. A. Schiff & Associates) that was previously located at Funland Hayling Island in Haying Island, Hampshire, England, UK. It was replaced by a steel roller coaster for the 1989 season, and the ride was sold for spares to David Pickstone for use on his Wild Mouse at Brean Leisure Park.
